title: And If Your Nancy Frowns, My Lad
content:
'"And if your Nancy frowns, my lad,
        And scorns a jacket blue,
        Just hoist your sails for other ports,
        And find a maid more true."'
meaning:
"And If Your Nancy Frowns, My Lad" is a quintessential example of Louisa May Alcott's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
